The Real Cost of Missed Calls for Roofers in London

High competition — 15+ trade businesses per postcode in central London. Emergency calls peak during commute hours when you're on the road. Diverse housing stock from Victorian terraces to new-build apartments. Tenant vs landlord enquiries need different handling.

While You're on the Job

Storm hits while you're already on a roof. Phones start ringing from multiple customers with active leaks. You're 30 feet up and can't answer. Every missed call is a competitor gaining a £14k re-roof job.

After Hours & Emergencies

A customer discovers water coming through their bedroom ceiling at 6pm. They call you first. You don't answer. They call three more roofers and the first to respond gets the £320 emergency repair.

The average London roofer misses multiple calls per day = £62,400 in lost revenue per year

Based on £14k full re-roof avg with 35% conversion rate

How Katie Works for Roofers in London

Three simple steps from missed call to booked job. No apps to check. No dashboards to monitor.

01

Katie Answers Instantly

Customer calls your London number. Katie picks up in under 2 rings with your branded greeting — 24/7, even when you're on another job or after hours.

02

She Qualifies the Job

Katie asks the right questions: London postcode, problem type, urgency level, property type, and when they need you. She identifies emergencies and marks them as urgent.

03

WhatsApp Alert in 3 Seconds

A structured message lands on your phone: name, number, postcode, problem, urgency, and estimated value. Tap Accept, Call Back, or Decline. Customer gets an instant SMS either way.

Questions Roofers in London Ask

Everything you need to know about AI call answering for roofers in London.

How much does AI call answering cost for roofers in London?

whoza.ai starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. That's less than one roofer job in London. Every plan includes unlimited AI calls, WhatsApp delivery, and a 7-day free trial. Most roofers recover the cost within 48 hours by capturing just one missed job.

Can Katie handle emergency calls for roofers in London?

Absolutely. Katie answers 24/7, including nights, weekends, and bank holidays. She identifies emergency calls and marks them as highest priority in your WhatsApp alert. Whether you're in London or anywhere in the UK, you'll see the emergency tag immediately and can respond within minutes.

What information does Katie collect from roofers customers in London?

Katie captures: full name, phone number, London postcode, property type, job description, urgency level, preferred appointment time, and how they found you. For emergencies, she also asks about immediate safety concerns and property damage extent.

Does it work with my existing London business phone number?

Yes. You simply set up call forwarding from your existing London business number to your whoza.ai number. Your customers dial the same number they've always used — Katie answers when you can't. Setup takes under 10 minutes and works with both mobile and landline numbers.

How quickly can I get set up as a roofer in London?

Most roofers in London are live and capturing calls within 30 minutes. Sign up, connect your number via call forwarding, set your greeting and business details, and Katie starts answering immediately. No hardware, no IT team, no technical knowledge required.

What makes whoza.ai different for roofers in London?

Unlike generic call answering services, Katie is trained specifically for roofers. She understands storm damage, slipped tiles, leak emergencies & full re-roof quotes — and with 32,000+ trade businesses competing in London, capturing every call gives you a real competitive edge.
